description: The 2023 UAW strike against the 'Big Three' automakers (Ford, GM, Stellantis) utilized a 'Stand Up' strike strategy, targeting specific plants. The union successfully pressured the companies for significant wage increases, maintaining majority public support throughout the process.

key_events.description: UAW launches innovative 'Stand Up' strike strategy.
President Biden visits a picket line, signaling federal support.
Automakers concede to major wage hikes.
Final contract ratification by UAW members.

calibration_notes: Useful for calibrating the impact of political alignment and innovative strike tactics on public perception.
